headlines.description: Nestory Irankunda and Connor Metcalfe scored and Australia spoiled Türkiye's return to the World Cup for the first time in 24 years with a 2-0 victory on Saturday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Australia shock Türkiye to go level with USMNT

headlines.description: Kai Havertz scored two goals as Germany pulled away from World Cup first-timer Curaçao late in the opening half and piled on after that in a 7-1 win Sunday in a group match.
headlines.shortLinkText: Havertz double leads Germany in WC opening rout

headlines.description: Japan hit back twice to start their World Cup campaign with an entertaining 2-2 draw against the Netherlands.
headlines.shortLinkText: Kamada scores late equaliser as Japan hold Netherlands to draw

headlines.description: A late goal from Amad Diallo earned the Ivory Coast a 1-0 win in and end-to-end opening World Cup clash with Ecuador in Philadelphia.
headlines.shortLinkText: Utd's Amad scores late as Ivory Coast top Ecuador

headlines.description: Yasin Ayari scored twice, while Alexander Isak and Viktor Gyökeres were also on target as Sweden cruised to a dominant 5-1 victory over Tunisia to move atop World Cup Group F.
headlines.shortLinkText: Ayari scores twice as Sweden routs Tunisia 5-1

headlines.description: Cape Verde pulled off the shock of the 2026 World Cup thus far as they held European champions Spain to a battling goalless draw in their Group H opener in Atlanta.
headlines.shortLinkText: Spain shocked by Cape Verde in World Cup opener

headlines.description: Romelu Lukaku's mere presence sparked an attack that led to Belgium's lone goal only seconds after he entered as a second-half substitute, helping his team earn a 1-1 draw with Egypt on Monday at the World Cup.
headlines.shortLinkText: Egypt, Belgium tie as Lukaku makes instant impact

headlines.description: Maxi Araújo rescued a point for Uruguay to deny Saudi Arabia another famous World Cup win as the sides drew 1-1 in Miami.
headlines.shortLinkText: Bielsa's Uruguay rescue point against dogged Saudi

headlines.description: Ramin Rezaeian and Mohammad Mohebbi scored for Iran, with Eli Just grabbing a brace for New Zealand.
headlines.shortLinkText: Iran and New Zealand play out thrilling 2-2 draw

headlines.description: Mbappe scores brace as France make statement in 3-1 win over Senegal
headlines.shortLinkText: Mbappe scores brace as France make statement in 3-1 win over Senegal

headlines.description: Erling Haaland scored his first World Cup goals with a brace as Norway started their campaign with a 4-1 win over Iraq in Boston.
headlines.shortLinkText: Haaland nets brace on WC debut, Norway beat Iraq

headlines.description: Lionel Messi equalled Miroslav Klose's record of 16 World Cup goals with a hat-trick as Argentina began their title defence with a 3-0 win over Algeria in Kansas City.
headlines.shortLinkText: Messi nets record hat trick in 3-0 win over Algeria

headlines.description: Austria won a World Cup game for the first time in 36 years with a 3-1 victory Tuesday over a Jordan team making their debut at the global showpiece.
headlines.shortLinkText: Austria get first WC win in 36 years against Jordan

headlines.description: Cristiano Ronaldo and his Portugal teammates could only manage a 1-1 draw with Congo DR on Wednesday in their opening World Cup match.
headlines.shortLinkText: Cristiano Ronaldo's Portugal held by Congo DR in World Cup opener

headlines.description: Caleb Yirenkyi scored in the fifth minute of second-half stoppage time as Ghana beat Panama 1-0 on Wednesday in the teams' World Cup opener.
headlines.shortLinkText: Ghana strike late for precious win over Panama

headlines.description: Second-half goals from Luis Díaz and Jáminton Campaz gave Colombia a 3-1 victory over debutants Uzbekistan.
headlines.shortLinkText: Díaz scores as Colombia edge battling Uzbekistan

headlines.description: A late penalty from Teboho Mokoena secured South Africa a 1-1 draw with the Czechia in Atalanta, which keeps alive both sides' hopes of qualification from Group A.
headlines.shortLinkText: South Africa snatch Czechia draw after late penalty

headlines.description: Substitute Johan Manzambi scored his first World Cup goal on an outstanding volley in the 74th minute, and Switzerland erupted late for a 4-1 victory over Bosnia-Herzegovina on Thursday to take control of its group.
headlines.shortLinkText: Switzerland turn on class late to ease past Bosnia

headlines.description: Canada beat 9-men Qatar 6-0 to go top of Group B
headlines.shortLinkText: David hat-trick sees Canada thrash Qatar for first World Cup win

headlines.description: A Luis Romo goal saw Mexico beat South Korea 1-0
headlines.shortLinkText: Mexico edge South Korea, confirm progress to knockouts

headlines.description: The U.S. advanced to the knockout round of the World Cup without their injured star forward, beating Australia 2-0 on Friday.
headlines.shortLinkText: U.S. into World Cup knockouts after dominant win over Australia

headlines.description: Scotland's spirited second-half rally was not enough to bring any World Cup joy as they suffered a frustrating 1-0 defeat to Morocco in Foxborough.
headlines.shortLinkText: Saibari scores again as Morocco see off Scotland

headlines.description: Brazil moved top of World Cup Group C with a 3-0 win over Haiti
headlines.shortLinkText: Matheus Cunha scores twice as rampant Brazil eliminate Haiti

headlines.description: 10-man Paraguay eliminate Turkey with 1-0 win
headlines.shortLinkText: 10-man Paraguay eliminate Turkey with 1-0 win

headlines.description: Brian Brobbey and Cody Gakpo scored two each as Netherlands cruised to a 5-1 World Cup victory over Sweden to go top of Group F.
headlines.shortLinkText: Netherlands thump Sweden 5-1 in statement win

headlines.description: A brace by substitute Deniz Undav fired Germany to a last-gasp 2-1 win over Ivory Coast to secure their place in the last 32 of the World Cup.
headlines.shortLinkText: Late Undav goal earns Germany win vs. Ivory Coast

headlines.description: Room made 15 saves - the most by any goalkeeper in 90 minutes of a World Cup match since records began in 1966
headlines.shortLinkText: Eloy Room's record 15 saves shut out Ecuador as Curacao earn first World Cup point

headlines.description: A dominant Japan produced the biggest margin of victory for an Asian nation in a World Cup match as they beat Tunisia 4-0
headlines.shortLinkText: Japan rout Tunisia 4-0, eliminate Hervé Renard from the World Cup

headlines.description: Spain got their World Cup campaign back on track with a 4-0 victory over Saudi Arabia in Atlanta.
headlines.shortLinkText: Yamal marks first WC start with goal in Spain win

headlines.description: Alireza Beiranvand made seven saves as Iran and 10-man Belgium played to a 0-0 draw at the World Cup on Sunday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Iran keeper stands tall in draw vs. 10-man Belgium

headlines.description: After holding Spain to a 0-0 draw, Cape Verde pulled off another impressive result with a draw against Uruguay.
headlines.shortLinkText: Impressive Cape Verde hold Uruguay to 2-2 draw

headlines.description: Mohamed Salah scored the go-ahead goal, and Egypt went on to defeat New Zealand 3-1 on Sunday night and secure a first-ever World Cup win.
headlines.shortLinkText: Salah leads rally as Egypt get first-ever WC win

headlines.description: Lionel Messi set a World Cup record with his 17th and 18th goals, and defending champion Argentina advanced to the knockout stage with a 2-0 victory over Austria on Monday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Messi bags two records as Argentina beat Austria

headlines.description: Kylian Mbappé scored twice to move into a tie for second in career World Cup goals with 16, and France played through the tournament's first rain delay to beat Iraq 3-0 on Monday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Mbappé scores twice in rain-delayed France win

headlines.description: Norway sensation Erling Haaland scored two stellar goals to lead his team to a fairly routine 3-2 win over Senegal at Gillette Stadium in Foxborough, Massachusetts, on Monday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Haaland nets 2 more as Norway clinch knockouts

headlines.description: Two second-half goals from corners saw Algeria come from behind to beat Jordan 2-1
headlines.shortLinkText: Algeria come from behind to beat Jordan and bolster qualification hopes

headlines.description: Cristiano Ronaldo scores twice as Portugal rout Uzbekistan to get campaign back on track
headlines.shortLinkText: Ronaldo at the double as Portugal rout Uzbekistan

headlines.description: Thomas Tuchel's stilted side stumbled to a 0-0 draw with well-drilled Ghana as England edged closer to the World Cup knockout phase in forgettable fashion.
headlines.shortLinkText: England held by Ghana as Kane skies late chance

headlines.description: Josip Stanisic lifted a curving cross onto the boot of Ante Budimir, who tapped it into an open net in the 54th minute Tuesday, giving Croatia a 1-0 win over Panama in the FIFA World Cup.
headlines.shortLinkText: Panama out of World Cup after loss to Croatia

headlines.description: Muñoz scored in the 76th minute after the Colombians had been held back by a strong performance from Congo DR goalkeeper Lionel Mpasi.
headlines.shortLinkText: Colombia edge Congo DR, reach Round of 32

events.name: Group B 2nd Place at Group A 2nd Place
Group F 2nd Place at Group C Winner
Third Place Group A/B/C/D/F at Germany
Group C 2nd Place at Group F Winner
